chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-789 of 2026 [Mrs. Reehana Kausar v. The Province of Sindh & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Present: Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. Riazat Ali Sahar J. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3219/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.3220/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 22.04.2026 Mr. Rizwan Akhter Khanzada, Advocate for Petitioner. == Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J- Urgency granted. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. The grievance of the petitioner is that despite the allotment of a plot by the Hyderabad Development Authority in a development scheme of said Authority, the petitioner has not been issued allotment letter, and that she now apprehends that the Authority has surreptitiously canceled her allotment. Given such averment, the petitioner’s entitlement to allotment of a plot is a contractual dispute which cannot be addressed in constitutional jurisdiction. The remedy of the petitioner is by way of a Civil Suit. Therefore the petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
